# Git Integration for Jira Cloud Documentation

> Git Integration for Jira Cloud documentation — connect your Git repositories to Jira Cloud for seamless issue tracking and development visibility.

## Getting Started

- [Git Integration for Jira Cloud Support Home](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/git-integration-for-jira-home-gij-cloud/): Your source for Git Integration for Jira Cloud documentation

## Documentation Pages

- [Adding webhooks for Azure DevOps Repos | VSTS](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/adding-webhooks-for-azure-devops-repos-vsts-gij-cloud/): Configure webhooks for Azure DevOps Repos (VSTS) in Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Adding webhooks for Azure DevOps Server | TFS](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/adding-webhooks-for-azure-devops-server-tfs-gij-cloud/): Configure webhooks for Azure DevOps Server (TFS) in Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Adding webhooks for Bitbucket Cloud](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/adding-webhooks-for-bitbucket-cloud-gij-cloud/): Configure webhooks for Bitbucket Cloud repositories in Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Adding webhooks for Gerrit](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/adding-webhooks-for-gerrit-gij-cloud/): Configure webhooks for Gerrit repositories in Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Adding webhooks for GitHub repository](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/adding-webhooks-for-github-repository-gij-cloud/): Configure webhooks for GitHub repositories in Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Adding webhooks for GitLab repository](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/adding-webhooks-for-gitlab-repository-gij-cloud/): Configure webhooks for GitLab repositories in Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Adding webhooks to AWS CodeCommit](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/adding-webhooks-to-aws-codecommit-gij-cloud/): Configure webhooks for AWS CodeCommit repositories in Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Admin Getting Started Guide](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/getting-started-guide/): Essential configuration guide for Jira Admins setting up Git Integration for Jira Cloud
- [Administration](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/administration-gij-cloud/): Administration resources for Git Integration for Jira Cloud including manager permissions, trusted users, and general settings.
- [Allow list (whitelist) GIJ Cloud](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/allow-list-whitelist-bigbrassband-cloud-gij-cloud/): Configure firewall settings to allow Git Integration for Jira Cloud to access your self-hosted git repositories.
- [App Support](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/app-support-gij-cloud/): Get help with Git Integration for Jira Cloud including installation, migration, and troubleshooting.
- [Application Operations and Planning](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/getting-started-guide-app-operations-and-planning/): Understanding integration types, indexing behavior, and planning your Git Integration for Jira structure
- [Associating project permissions](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/associating-project-permissions-gij-cloud/): How to configure project-level permissions for Git integrations and repositories
- [Automatically connect to HTTPS git repositories with self-signed SSL certificates or other SSL issues](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/automatically-connect-to-https-git-repositories-with-self-signed-ssl-certificates-or-other-ssl-issues-gij-cloud/): How to set up integrations with self-signed SSL certificates using automatic connection
- [AWS CodeCommit for Git Integration for Jira Cloud](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/aws-codecommit-gij-cloud/): Learn how to integrate AWS CodeCommit git repositories with Jira Cloud using Git Integration for Jira.
- [AWS CodeCommit webhook events](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/aws-codecommit-webhook-events-gij-cloud/): Reference documentation for AWS CodeCommit webhook event types supported by Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Azure DevOps Server | Team Foundation Services (TFS)](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/azure-devops-server-team-foundation-services-tfs-gij-cloud/): Learn how to integrate Azure DevOps Server and Team Foundation Services (TFS) git repositories with Jira Cloud using Git Integration for Jira.
- [Azure DevOps | Visual Studio Team Services (VSTS)](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/azure-devops-visual-studio-team-services-vsts-gij-cloud/): Learn how to integrate Azure DevOps and Visual Studio Team Services (VSTS) git repositories with Jira Cloud using Git Integration for Jira.
- [BigBrassBand Acquisition Info & FAQs](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/bigbrassband-acquisition-info-faqs-gij-cloud/): Information and frequently asked questions about GitKraken's acquisition of BigBrassBand and Git Integration for Jira
- [Bitbucket Cloud](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/bitbucket-cloud-gij-cloud/): Learn how to integrate Bitbucket Cloud git repositories with Jira Cloud using Git Integration for Jira.
- [Bitbucket JMESPath filter examples](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/bitbucket-jmespath-filter-examples-gij-cloud/): Bitbucket JMESPath filter examples
- [Bitbucket webhook events](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/bitbucket-webhook-events-gij-cloud/): Reference documentation for Bitbucket webhook event types supported by Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [CI/CD for Jira Cloud](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/cicd-getting-started-with-ci-cd-for-jira-gij-cloud/): Learn how to use CI/CD for Jira Cloud to connect your DevOps pipelines with Jira's builds and deployments features.
- [Classic Indexing Explainer](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/classic-indexing-explainer-gij-cloud/): Learn how Git Integration for Jira Cloud indexes commits, branches, tags, and pull requests using classic indexing.
- [Code syntax highlighter](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/code-syntax-highlighter-gij-cloud/): Code syntax highlighter
- [Commit-msg Hook](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/commit-msg-hook-gij-cloud/): Configure the commit-msg client-side hook to validate Jira ticket references in commit messages.
- [Connected apps](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/connected-apps-gij-cloud/): Learn how to enable or disable GitKraken integration and deep linking features in Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Connecting SSH Git Repositories to Jira Cloud](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/connecting-ssh-git-repositories-to-jira-cloud-gij-cloud/): Learn how to connect SSH git repositories to Jira Cloud, including SSH key generation and configuration.
- [Connecting to a Single Git Repository](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/connecting-to-a-single-git-repository-http-https-gij-cloud/): Learn how to connect a single git repository to Jira Cloud using HTTP/HTTPS or SSH protocols with Git Integration for Jira.
- [Create Branch and Pull/Merge Request](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/create-branch-gij-cloud/): Learn how to create branches and pull/merge requests directly from Jira issues using Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Creating indexing triggers for a single repository](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/creating-indexing-triggers-for-a-single-repository-gij-cloud/): Create indexing triggers for individual repositories using webhooks with Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Creating Personal Access Tokens](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/creating-personal-access-tokens-gij-cloud/): Create personal access tokens (PATs) for GitHub, GitLab, Azure DevOps, TFS, and AWS CodeCommit to authenticate with Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Deep Linking](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/deeplinking-feature-gij-cloud/): Learn how to use deep linking in Git Integration for Jira Cloud to open repositories, commits, branches, and tags in GitKraken or GitLens.
- [Default branch feature](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/default-branch-feature-gij-cloud/): Learn how to configure default branches for repositories when creating new branches from Jira issues.
- [Default repository feature](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/default-repository-feature-gij-cloud/): Learn how to set default repositories for Jira projects when using the Create Branch and Create Pull Request features.
- [Deprecation notice (GIJ Cloud)](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/deprecation-notice-gij-cloud/): Features and functionality being deprecated or removed from Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Disconnecting integrations or repositories](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/removing-integration-or-repository-configuration-gij-cloud/): How to disconnect and remove integrations or repositories from Git Integration for Jira Cloud
- [Documentation](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/documentation-gij-cloud/): Complete documentation for Git Integration for Jira Cloud
- [Edit integration settings](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/edit-integration-gij-cloud/): How to configure integration connection and feature settings
- [Edit nested repository settings](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/edit-nested-repository-settings-gij-cloud/): How to modify nested repository configuration settings
- [Edit repository settings](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/edit-repository-gij-cloud/): How to configure repository connection and feature settings
- [Feature matrix of Git Integration for Jira Cloud](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/feature-matrix-of-git-integration-for-jira-cloud-gij-cloud/): Compare features available across different integration types including git service integrations, single repositories, and webhook indexing.
- [Features](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/features-gij-cloud/): Overview of Git Integration for Jira Cloud features including deep linking, CI/CD integration, automation, and repository management.
- [Fix for empty JSON files](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/fix-for-empty-json-files-gij-cloud/): Troubleshooting guide for corrupted JSON configuration files in Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Format Testing Page](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/testing/): Format Testing Page
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/frequently-asked-questions-gij-cloud/): Find answers to common questions about Git Integration for Jira Cloud, including setup, configuration, and troubleshooting.
- [General Settings](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/general-settings-gij-cloud/): Configure Git Integration for Jira Cloud general settings including development panel options, branch naming, and integration features.
- [General settings for administrators](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/general-settings-for-administrators-gij-cloud/): Overview of general settings configuration for Jira administrators using Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [General View (Signals)](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/signals-general-view-gij-cloud/): Learn how to use the General View in Signals to monitor Jira issues, track activity timelines, and filter by projects, sprints, and team members.
- [Gerrit](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/gerrit-gij-cloud/): Learn how to integrate Gerrit git repositories with Jira Cloud using Git Integration for Jira.
- [Gerrit webhook indexing integration](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/gerrit-webhook-indexing-integration-gij-cloud/): Configure webhook indexing integration for Gerrit to work with Git Integration for Jira Cloud behind firewalls.
- [GIJ Advanced Support Form](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/gij-advanced-support-form/): Submit a support request for GIJ Advanced edition.
- [GIJ Advanced Support Guide](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/gij-advanced-support-guide/): Guidelines for submitting priority support requests for GIJ Advanced edition.
- [GIJ Standard vs Advanced](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/gij standard vs advanced/): Learn about the differences between the Standard and Advanced versions of Git Integration for Jira
- [GIJ Standard vs Advanced Feature matrix](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/gij standard vs advanced features/): New Doc Description
- [GIJ Terms and Conditions](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/sla-terms-and-conditions-gij-cloud/): Support coverage, commitments, and service level agreements for Git Integration for Jira.
- [Git Commits Issue Tab and Project Pages (Features)](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/git-commits-issue-tab-and-project-pages-gij-cloud/): Learn how to view git commits associated with Jira issues and projects using the Git Commits Issue Tab and Project Page.
- [Git Integration (Jira Cloud) - Video Guides](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/git-integration-jira-cloud-video-guides-gij-cloud/): Watch video tutorials covering installation, integration, administration, and customization of Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Git Integration + Jira Automation](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/git-integration-jira-automation-gij-cloud/): Learn how to configure Jira automation rules with Git Integration for Jira Cloud triggers for branches, commits, and pull requests.
- [Git Integration for Jira Cloud - Release Notes](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/git-integration-for-jira-cloud-release-notes-gij-cloud/): Release notes documenting new features, improvements, bug fixes, and security updates for Git Integration for Jira Cloud
- [Git Integration Server/Data Center vs Jira Cloud - Feature Comparison](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/git-integration-server-data-center-vs-jira-cloud-feature-comparison-gij-cloud/): Compare features between Git Integration for Jira Server/Data Center and Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Git Roll Up Issue Tab (Features)](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/git-roll-up-issue-tab-gij-cloud/): Learn how to use the Git Roll Up Issue Tab to view commit summaries, file changes, and developer activity in Jira issues.
- [Git Services Support Page and End-of-Life Policies](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/git-services-support-page-and-end-of-life-policies-gij-cloud/): End-of-life policies and support information for git services compatible with Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Git URL Ports](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/git-url-ports-gij-cloud/): Default port configurations for Git URL protocols
- [Git User Identity](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/git-user-identity-gij-cloud/): How Git user identity is configured and displayed in Jira
- [GitHub App integration](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/github-app-gij-cloud/): How to integrate GitHub repositories using the GitHub App with Jira Cloud
- [GitHub Enterprise Server](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/github-enterprise-server-gij-cloud/): How to integrate GitHub Enterprise Server repositories with Jira Cloud
- [GitHub webhook events](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/github-webhook-events-gij-cloud/): Reference documentation for GitHub webhook event types supported by Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [GitHub webhook indexing integration](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/github-webhook-indexing-integration-gij-cloud/): Configure webhook indexing integration for GitHub.com or GitHub Enterprise Server to work with Git Integration for Jira Cloud behind firewalls.
- [GitHub.com](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/github-com-gij-cloud/): Integrate GitHub.com repositories with Jira Cloud using Git Integration for Jira.
- [GitHub.com | GitHub Enterprise JMESPath filter examples](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/github-com-github-enterprise-jmespath-filter-examples-gij-cloud/): GitHub.com | GitHub Enterprise JMESPath filter examples
- [GitLab CE/EE](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/gitlab-ce-ee-gij-cloud/): How to integrate GitLab CE/EE repositories with Jira Cloud
- [GitLab webhook events](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/gitlab-webhook-events-gij-cloud/): Reference documentation for GitLab webhook event types supported by Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [GitLab webhook indexing integration](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/gitlab-webhook-indexing-integration-gij-cloud/): Configure webhook indexing integration for GitLab.com or GitLab CE/EE to work with Git Integration for Jira Cloud behind firewalls.
- [GitLab.com](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/gitlab-com-gij-cloud/): How to integrate GitLab.com repositories with Jira Cloud
- [GitLab.com | GitLab CE/EE JMESPath filter examples](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/gitlab-com-gitlab-ce-ee-jmespath-filter-examples-gij-cloud/): GitLab.com | GitLab CE/EE JMESPath filter examples
- [Glossary of terms](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/glossary-of-terms-gij-cloud/): Definitions of common terms used in Git Integration for Jira documentation
- [Hooks and Webhooks](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/hooks-and-webhooks-gij-cloud/): Configure client-side hooks, server-side hooks, and indexing triggers for Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [How to Calculate Pricing](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/how-to-calculate-pricing-gij-cloud/): Calculate Git Integration for Jira Cloud pricing using the Atlassian Cloud Pricing Calculator or Marketplace.
- [How to Create Reindex Triggers for a Single Repository](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/how-to-create-reindex-triggers-for-a-single-repository-gij-cloud/): Create webhook triggers to reindex a single repository in Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [How to get a quote?](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/how-to-get-a-quote-gij-cloud/): Generate a pricing quote for Git Integration for Jira Cloud through the Atlassian Marketplace.
- [How-to articles](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/how-to-articles-gij-cloud/): Browse step-by-step guides for Git Integration for Jira Cloud including pricing, configuration, and integration workflows.
- [Indexing Triggers](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/indexing-triggers-gij-cloud/): Configure indexing triggers (webhooks) to enable real-time repository updates in Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Indexing triggers (formerly Webhooks)](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/indexing-triggers-formerly-webhooks-gij-cloud/): How to configure indexing triggers for faster repository updates in Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Installation via Atlassian Marketplace](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/installation-via-atlassian-marketplace-gij-cloud/): How to install Git Integration for Jira Cloud from the Atlassian Marketplace
- [Integration Creation and Post Integration Configuration](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/getting-started-guide-integration-creation-post-integration-config/): Step-by-step guidance for creating integrations and configuring post-integration settings
- [Integration Guide](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/integration-guide-gij-cloud/): Guide to connecting Git repositories with Jira Cloud using Git Integration for Jira
- [Introduction to Git integration](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/introduction-to-git-integration-gij-cloud/): Learn how to integrate Git repositories with Jira Cloud
- [Issue Git Source Code Panel](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/issue-git-source-code-panel-gij-cloud/): Learn how to view commits, branches, pull requests, and tags in the Issue Git Source Code Panel on Jira issues.
- [Jira Development Information settings feature](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/jira-development-information-settings-features-gij-cloud/): Jira Development Information settings feature
- [Jira issue page](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/jira-issue-page-gij-cloud/): Git development information displayed on the Jira issue page
- [Jira project page](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/jira-project-page-gij-cloud/): How to view Git commits on the Jira project page
- [Jira user information card](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/jira-user-information-card-gij-cloud/): How to view user information cards in Git Integration for Jira Cloud
- [JQL Searching for Commits and Pull Requests](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/jql-searching-for-commits-and-pull-requests-gij-cloud/): Learn how to use JQL syntax to search for Jira issues based on commit and pull request activity.
- [Known Issues (GIJ Cloud)](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/known-issues-gij-cloud/): Known issues and workarounds for Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Known Issues for Signals](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/signals-known-issues-gij-cloud/): Review known issues and workarounds for the Signals feature in Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Known Performance Limitations](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/known-performance-limitations-gij-cloud/): Soft limits and performance guidelines for Git Integration for Jira Cloud
- [Licensing notice](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/licensing-notice-gij-cloud/): License information for Git Integration for Jira Cloud
- [Linking git commits to Jira issues](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/linking-git-commits-to-jira-issues-gij-cloud/): How to link Git commits, branches, and pull requests to Jira issues
- [Localization support](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/localization-support-gij-cloud/): Supported languages for Git Integration for Jira Cloud
- [Manager permissions](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/manager-permissions-gij-cloud/): Learn how to configure manager permissions in Git Integration for Jira Cloud to delegate app administration to non-admin users.
- [Managing integration or repository configuration](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/managing-integration-or-repository-configuration-gij-cloud/): How to manage Git integrations and repositories in Jira Cloud
- [Managing integrations via Actions (Jira Cloud)](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/managing-integrations-via-actions-jira-cloud-gij-cloud/): How to use Actions to manage Git integrations and repositories
- [Manually connect to HTTPS git repositories with self-signed SSL certificates or other SSL issues](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/manually-connect-to-https-git-repositories-with-self-signed-ssl-certificates-or-other-ssl-issues-gij-cloud/): How to manually set up git repository connections with self-signed SSL certificates
- [Microsoft webhook events](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/microsoft-webhook-events-gij-cloud/): Reference documentation for Microsoft (Azure DevOps/VSTS/TFS) webhook event types supported by Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Microsoft webhook indexing integration](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/microsoft-webhook-indexing-integration-gij-cloud/): Configure webhook indexing integration for Azure DevOps, Azure Repos, VSTS, or TFS to work with Git Integration for Jira Cloud behind firewalls.
- [Microsoft | VSTS | TFS | Azure Repos JMESPath filter examples](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/microsoft-vsts-tfs-azure-repos-jmespath-filter-examples-gij-cloud/): Microsoft | VSTS | TFS | Azure Repos JMESPath filter examples
- [Migrating from Jira Server + Data Center to Jira Cloud](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/migrating-from-jira-server-data-center-to-jira-cloud-gij-cloud/): Step-by-step guide for migrating Git Integration for Jira from Server or Data Center to Jira Cloud.
- [Nested repository](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/nested-repository-gij-cloud/): Understanding and configuring nested repositories in Git Integration for Jira Cloud
- [New Doc Title](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/gij-cloud-new-doc/): New Doc Description
- [Optional Features and Add-on Extensions](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/getting-started-guide-optional-features/): Explore optional features and free add-on applications that extend Git Integration for Jira functionality
- [Permissions](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/permissions-gij-cloud/): Permission requirements for viewing commit information and Git data in Jira
- [Personal access token feature](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/personal-access-token-feature-gij-cloud/): Learn how to configure personal access tokens for git integrations in Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Productivity guide](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/productivity-guide-gij-cloud/): Configure indexing triggers and Automation for Jira to streamline your Git workflows.
- [Pull Request timeline for Signals](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/pull-request-timeline-for-signals-gij-cloud/): Learn about pull request timeline reindexing and permission requirements for GitHub and GitLab integrations with Signals.
- [Reindexing](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/reindexing-gij-cloud/): How to manually reindex repositories in Git Integration for Jira Cloud
- [Repository browser](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/repository-browser-gij-cloud/): View and browse Git repositories in Jira Cloud using the Repository browser
- [Require Personal Access Tokens for user actions (create branch/pull request)](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/require-personal-access-tokens-for-user-actions-create-branch-pull-request-gij-cloud/): Configure Git Integration for Jira Cloud to require personal access tokens for user actions like creating branches and pull requests.
- [Self-signed HTTPS integration](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/self-signed-https-integration-gij-cloud/): How to integrate repositories using self-signed HTTPS certificates
- [Server-side Hook](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/server-side-hook-gij-cloud/): Configure server-side hooks to enforce Jira ticket policies on git pushes.
- [Setting Project Permissions](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/setting-project-permissions-gij-cloud/): Configure project permissions to control which Jira projects can access Git integration data and repository content.
- [Setting up integrations](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/setting-up-integrations-gij-cloud/): How to set up and manage Git repository integrations in Jira Cloud
- [Setup GitLab Server to respond to incoming network API calls](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/setup-gitlab-server-to-respond-to-incoming-network-api-calls-gij-cloud/): Setup GitLab Server to respond to incoming network API calls
- [Signals - GIJ Advanced](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/signals-gij-cloud/): Learn how to use Signals (Team Insights for Jira) to monitor team activity, track sprint progress, and identify work risks in Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Signals Backlog View](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/signals-backlog-view-gij-cloud/): Learn how to use the Backlog View in Signals to track sprint progress, identify work risks, and manage backlog priorities.
- [Signals Risk View Settings](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/signals-risk-view-gij-cloud/): Configure risk thresholds and severity levels for sprints, issues, and pull requests in Signals to identify potential project risks.
- [Signals Teams View](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/signals-teams-view-gij-cloud/): Learn how to use the Teams View in Signals to monitor team member activities, track assignments, and view individual progress.
- [Smart commits](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/smart-commits-gij-cloud/): Use Smart commits to perform actions on Jira issues directly from Git commit messages
- [SSL verify](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/ssl-verify-gij-cloud/): How to configure SSL verification for Git integrations
- [Troubleshooting articles](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/troubleshooting-articles-gij-cloud/): Solutions and workarounds for common issues with Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Trusted Users](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/trusted-users-gij-cloud/): Learn how to assign the Trusted role to users for Git Integration for Jira Cloud administrative access.
- [User Guide - GIJ Cloud](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/end-user-guide-cloud/): End user guide for Git Integration for Jira Cloud - learn how to view and create Git data in Jira
- [User Settings](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/user-settings-gij-cloud/): Configure default repositories, default branches, connected apps, and personal access tokens in Git Integration for Jira Cloud user settings.
- [Using the Git service integration wizard](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/using-the-git-service-integration-wizard-gij-cloud/): How to use the Git service integration wizard to connect repositories
- [Using the Single git integration wizard](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/using-the-single-git-integration-wizard-gij-cloud/): How to connect single git repositories using the integration wizard
- [Using the Webhook indexing integration wizard](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/using-the-webhooks-indexing-integration-wizard-gij-cloud/): How to use the Webhook indexing integration wizard for Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [View repository indexing logs](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/view-repository-indexing-logs-gij-cloud/): How to view and download repository indexing logs
- [Viewing commit code diffs](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/viewing-commit-code-diffs-gij-cloud/): How to view commit code differences in Git Integration for Jira Cloud
- [Web linking](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/web-linking-gij-cloud/): Configuring web links to your git hosting provider in Git Integration for Jira Cloud
- [Webhook GitHub Organization support](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/webhook-github-organization-support-gij-cloud/): Configure organization-level webhooks in GitHub to automatically register webhooks for all repositories.
- [Webhook indexing integration](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/webhook-indexing-integration-gij-cloud/): Learn how to configure webhook indexing integration for Git Integration for Jira Cloud to work with git servers behind firewalls.
- [Working with Custom API Path](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/working-with-custom-api-path-gij-cloud/): Configure Custom API Path to filter and retrieve specific repositories from GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket integrations in Git Integration for Jira Cloud.
- [Working with JMESPath Filters](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/working-with-jmespath-filters-gij-cloud/): Learn how to use JMESPath query language to filter API results and control which repositories are integrated with Jira Cloud.
- [Working with SSH keys](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-cloud/working-with-ssh-keys-gij-cloud/): How to generate and configure SSH keys for Git Integration for Jira Cloud
